suburban bus shelter at dawn, wet seats, no passengers
kitchen table set for one, chair pulled too far back
laundromat washer door open, single sock on tile floor
office copier glowing in darkness, paper tray overflowing
school hallway trophy case reflecting a figure behind you
motel ice machine alcove, carpet soaked beneath humming pipes
grocery freezer aisle, one door fogged from inside
public restroom mirror showing one extra sink reflection
quiet cul-de-sac, every porch light on except one
basement rec room with television static and deflated balloons
hospital corridor window looking onto another identical corridor
self-storage hallway, one unit door rolled halfway open
empty diner booth, coffee steaming beside untouched pie
subway platform clock stopped, train lights approaching slowly
bedroom closet door ajar, hangers swaying without wind
